descriptionInUI: Runtime for the COIN insurgency layer's moving objects and ambient pressure. Inert unless the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.coin (a COIN campaign with something alive this turn). Movement and cosmetics ONLY -- the consequences (kill the HVT before the strike window closes = a decapitation; intercept the VBIED = defused; let either live = it resolves against your political mandate) stay in the campaign's turn logic, so a mover you shoot down is recorded natively like any other unit. HVT: the named leader's convoy drives a slow, random patrol around its area (alarm-green, so it relocates rather than stopping to fight). VBIED: the suicide vehicle bomb drives for the nearest friendly base; kill it en route or it detonates on arrival. Field cells: each dispersed cell wanders its patch of countryside, so patrolling means catching something moving. Infiltrators: the re-infiltration cell creeps toward the base it is taking. Indirect fire: friendly bases inside a stronghold's mortar reach draw sporadic small rocket/mortar barrages (never a field a player spawns at or recovers to -- filtered by the generator AND double-guarded here -- and only after a startup grace period). All movement is off-road at low ground speed; movers begin after a short startup grace so nothing lurches the instant the mission loads.

specificOptions.nameInUI: HVT: seconds between patrol legs (re-rolls a new destination)
HVT: patrol radius around his area (m)
VBIED: seconds between re-issuing the drive order (anti-stall)
Field cell: seconds between patrol legs
Field cell: patrol radius around its patch (m)
Infiltrator: creep speed toward the target base (km/h)
Infiltrator: seconds between re-issuing the creep order
Indirect fire: mean seconds between barrages on a base
Indirect fire: impact dispersion around the base (m)
Indirect fire: no-fire grace at mission start (s)
